subcodes.first_line: O Namesake of the Desired One! Hearken unto the Call of God, the Mighty, the Loving, from His praised station - verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمی المقصود اسمع ندآء الله العزیز الودود من مقامه المحمود انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
